subject: Added initial version of data layer helm chart (only includes basic infra and mariadb)
commit_message:
Added initial version of data layer helm chart (only includes basic infra and mariadb)

Note that any file under data-layer/charts directory is copied from oom/kubernetes
and no changes were made to the copied files

Signed-off-by: Ahmad Abedalqader <ahmadse2022@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I32dc4eb22c30a2566d4975338cc4afa492f5d445
Signed-off-by: Ahmad Abedalqader <ahmadse2022@gmail.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Ahmad Abedalqader <ahmadse2022@gmail.com>
